programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Service Challenge: Vue de Monde
programme.desc: The remaining three contestants compete in a service challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test: Nobu Matsuhisa
programme.desc: In a pressure test like no other, internationally acclaimed chef Nobu Matsuhisa sets a challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box Challenge: Barter
programme.desc: With the same six items in each mystery box, the contestants must all barter to get a variety of ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box and Invention Tests
programme.desc: The 21 contestants enter the kitchen to find a mystery box at their bench.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test Elimination – Christy Tania’s Mango Alfonso
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Invention Test: Chocolate
programme.desc: In the invention test, each team has to produce one sweet and one savoury dish using chocolate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test: Nick Palumbo's Choc-Top Ice Creams
programme.desc: In the Pressure Test, the contestants must make four of Nick Palumbo's choc-top ice creams from scratch.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The losing team from the off-site challenge will compete in a time-auction elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Gumbo Elimination
programme.desc: The contestants from the losing team compete in a blind taste test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Top 50 - Audition Dish
programme.desc: 50 contestants arrive and cook their best Audition Dish for the Judges in the hope of earning an apron.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Part 1: Invention Test & Part 2: George's Pressure Test
programme.desc: Just 10 aprons remain for the 18 remaining aspiring home cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box - Past Champions Inspiring Future Champions
programme.desc: The top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for the very first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Kylie Kwong Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: 21 contestants face elimination for the first time with a three-round challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box and Invention Tests
programme.desc: The 21 contestants enter the kitchen to find a mystery box at their bench.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test Elimination with Guest Chef Shannon Bennett
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Team Challenge: Upstairs Downstairs Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants split into two teams for a lunch service challenge at two popular St Kilda restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: How Far Will Your Fish Go?
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge are all facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP23
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP9
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants cook one savoury dish and one sweet dish for the MasterChef judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP10
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants cook with their ‘weapons of choice’ – a cream canister, smoking gun or blow torch.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP11
programme.desc: The The Top Eight contestants cook a three course dinner for 80 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP12
programme.desc: The contestants must each cook a dish using My Food Bag ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP13
programme.desc: There’s a big travel prize up for grabs as the Top Six contestants cook dishes featuring New Zealand clams.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP14
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate a complicated dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP15
programme.desc: At Al Maha resort in the Arabian desert, the Top Four contestants pair off to cook a seven-course feast.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP16
programme.desc: At Grosvenor House in Dubai, the contestants cook a three-course meal for 24 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP17
programme.desc: In the semi-final, the top three contestants cook their signature dishes for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP18
programme.desc: The two finalists face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Semi-Finals Service Challenge
programme.desc: It is the semi-final of MasterChef Australia 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: MasterChef is back as Australia’s most talented home cooks compete in season 10.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Auditions: Part 2
programme.desc: With 18 aprons given away yesterday, there are just six left.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Individual Challenge: Home Cooked Meal
programme.desc: Our 2018 cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen for their first challenge as the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: What's in the Fridge
programme.desc: It’s the first elimination of the season!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Mystery Box 1
programme.desc: The surviving contestants are more determined than ever to impress the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Metter, Michelle and Samira wake in the house to find themselves facing a feared Pressure Test.
